content: // TODO: add a "click here" tooltip later
note: prescriptive copy inside a comment, not user-facing -> should NOT fire (documented FP mode)
tabindex shown as documentation text, not a real attribute -> should NOT fire (documented FP mode)
the 200px track is a real reflow risk; an unrelated min(50px,100%) wrongly suppresses it (documented FN mode)
focusable button inside an aria-hidden region across lines is a real focus trap; per-line heuristic misses it (documented FN mode)
a single role=alert is fine -> correct silence
the correctly fixed pattern -> correct silence
